Name: insert_departments
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "name", $3::text AS "description" UNION ALL SELECT $4::uuid AS "id", $5::text AS "name", $6::text AS "description") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("id", "name", "description") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."name", check_mutation_result."description" FROM check_mutation_result ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT "departments_pkey" DO UPDATE SET "name" = EXCLUDED."name", "description" = EXCLUDED."description" RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."description" AS "description" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
